feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Thang Pham — Postdoctoral researcher at Argonne National Laboratory working on agentic AI systems for scientific discovery.

entry.title: Hello, and welcome
entry.content:
Welcome! I’m Thang, a postdoctoral researcher at Argonne National Laboratory working on agentic AI systems for scientific discovery.

I plan to use this space for short, practical notes on the things I work on day to day: designing multi-agent workflows, running agents on HPC systems, connecting large language models to simulation codes and scientific data, and evaluating whether these systems actually do useful science.

More soon.
entry.summary: A short note on what I plan to write about here.
